title: 6 Pack Pink Pens, Cute Retractable 0.5mm Fine Tip Pink Pens Black Ink with Bows, Kawaii Stationery Set, Back to School Gift for Kids, Cute Stationary for Student Note Taking, Writing, Office Supplies
features: 【Exquisite Pen Set】This set contains 6 cute pens, which are carefully crafted in a cute style, presenting a variety of pen holding methods, bringing a unique writing experience, cute colors, different styles, showing fashionable personality

【Smooth And Diverse Nibs】 The ink of this aesthetic pens set flows evenly and smoothly, making writing easy and comfortable, bringing a pleasant mood. the nib is delicately embedded in the spring structure to ensure stable ink discharge, making writing smoother and more comfortable

【High-Quality Quick-Drying Ink】 The 0.5mm retractable pink pens uses quick-drying ink technology to effectively prevent ink from smudging and keep the paper clean, especially for left-handed people or people who have the habit of dragging their hands when writing. each nib is sealed with wax to prevent the ink from drying up

【Convenient Pen Clip】Each cute stationary is equipped with a durable pen clip, which can be firmly clipped on books, notebooks or bags, making it easy to carry around without worrying about losing it. the retractable nib design makes it more convenient to use

【Ideal Gift Choice】 This cute stationery for girls is the best choice for children who are about to enter school. it is suitable for both personal use and gifts for relatives and friends. it is also a great gift for birthdays and christmas
